function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_23__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 23-12-2025 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It's attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachment path was read earlier; single attachment ordering trivially newest-first; recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email from 10_entities/cast/nina.md; no YAML quoting issues detected in subject. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.

next_step.observation: Created outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with the requested invoice attached.
